dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Hi, I’m Emma. Let me share one small habit that helps me every day.
dialogue.chinese: 大家好，我是艾玛。让我分享一个每天都在帮助我的小习惯。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Each morning, I drink a glass of water after I get out of bed.
dialogue.chinese: 每天早上起床后，我都会喝一杯水。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: The water is cool and fresh, and it helps me wake up slowly.
dialogue.chinese: 水又凉又清新，能帮助我慢慢清醒。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I keep a blue cup beside the sink, so it is easy to remember.
dialogue.chinese: 我把一个蓝色杯子放在水池旁边，这样就很容易记住。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I fill the cup, take a small sip, and enjoy the quiet morning.
dialogue.chinese: 我把杯子装满，喝上一小口，享受安静的早晨。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Drinking water makes my mouth feel fresh and my body feel ready.
dialogue.chinese: 喝水让我的嘴巴感觉清爽，也让身体准备好开始一天。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I also carry a small bottle when I go to school or work.
dialogue.chinese: 去学校或上班时，我也会带一个小水瓶。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: When I feel tired, I stop for a moment and take a drink.
dialogue.chinese: 感到累的时候，我会停一会儿，喝一口水。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: This short break helps me slow down and begin again with more energy.
dialogue.chinese: 这短暂的休息让我慢下来，再更有精神地重新开始。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I do not need a special drink or a difficult plan.
dialogue.chinese: 我不需要特别的饮料，也不需要复杂的计划。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clean water and a few quiet seconds are enough for this simple habit.
dialogue.chinese: 干净的水和几秒钟的安静时间，就足够养成这个简单习惯。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: At night, I wash my cup and put it back by the sink.
dialogue.chinese: 晚上，我洗好杯子，再把它放回水池旁边。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Then it is ready for me when a new morning begins.
dialogue.chinese: 这样，新的一天开始时，它已经准备好了。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: One small glass of water can be a kind start to your day.
dialogue.chinese: 一小杯水，就能为你的一天带来温柔的开始。
